ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal for the project */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged to the project */,
  "percentage_funded" REAL /* Percentage of the funding goal that has been achieved */,
  "average_donations" REAL /* Average donation amount for the project */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Outcome status of the project (e.g., failed, successful) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for pledging */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Deadline for the project funding */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Date the project was launched */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is a staff pick */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers who have supported the project */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is featured in the spotlight */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the project */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's main image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a project video */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's page on the platform */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the project or creator */,
  "facebook_page" TEXT /* Facebook page URL of the project or creator */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the project or creator */,
  "updates_count" INTEGER /* Number of updates posted by the creator */,
  "rewards_count" INTEGER /* Number of different reward tiers offered */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the project has been viewed */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the project has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., theater, music) */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category name if applicable (e.g., performing arts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category's image */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the category name */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the backer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the backer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a backer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the backer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the backer's profile image */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the backer */,
  "facebook_page" TEXT /* Facebook page URL of the backer */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the backer */,
  "total_pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged by the backer */,
  "projects_supported_count" INTEGER /* Number of projects the backer has supported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being pledged to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer making the pledge */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount pledged towards the project */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "reward_tier" TEXT /* Description of the reward tier chosen by the backer */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reward */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the pledge is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which the outcome is reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Final status of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "final_amount" REAL /* Final amount raised at project close */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was reported */,
  "final_percentage_funded" REAL /* Final percentage of the funding goal achieved */,
  "final_backers_count" INTEGER /* Final number of backers at project closure */,
  "final_average_donation" REAL /* Final average donation amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the user */,
  "facebook_page" TEXT /* Facebook page URL of the user */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
